scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm --workspace @pixel/shared-types run build && npm --workspace @pixel/avatar-engine run build
scripts.build:apps: npm --workspace @pixel/api run build && npm --workspace @pixel/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:packages && npm run typecheck:apps
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm --workspace @pixel/shared-types run typecheck && npm --workspace @pixel/avatar-engine run typecheck
scripts.typecheck:apps: npm --workspace @pixel/api run typecheck && npm --workspace @pixel/web run typecheck
